## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (`logger` + `from logger import get_logger` for new modules)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (README / SKILL.md)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked that no real personal data, API keys, or hardcoded credentials are introduced
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
